name: Chocolate Quick Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients at low speed until the dry ingredients are moistened and then increase to medium speed until smooth.
3. Pour the batter into two well-greased, 8-inch round layer cake pans or one 9-by-13-inch pan.
4. Bake for 25 minutes for layers or 30 minutes for a large cake until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
5. Allow to cool before frosting with your desired frosting.
